Home About Instruction DJ Services Dance Floor Contact

Portable Dance Floor Rental

Transform any venue into the perfect dance floor. Our professional-grade, LED-lit portable dance floors are perfect for weddings, celebrations, and events of any size.

Floor Options

We offer three sizes to fit your venue and guest count:

8’ x 8’ Dance Floor

Perfect for intimate gatherings

  • Small weddings (up to 75 guests)
  • Cocktail parties
  • Small celebrations
  • Ideal for first dance spotlight

12’ x 12’ Dance Floor

Our most popular option

  • Medium weddings (75-200 guests)
  • Anniversary parties
  • Corporate events
  • Great for dancing and mingling

16’ x 16’ Dance Floor

Maximum dance space

  • Large weddings (200+ guests)
  • Major celebrations
  • Multiple simultaneous dancers
  • Ultimate party energy

What’s Included

✓ Professional-grade dance surface (slip-resistant) ✓ LED perimeter lighting (customizable colors) ✓ Setup and breakdown ✓ Delivery and installation ✓ 24-hour event support (by phone) ✓ Insurance included

Features

  • Durable Surface - Handles all dance styles (Country Two Step, Salsa, Swing, Waltz, Bachata, etc.)
  • LED Lighting - Creates ambiance and highlights the dance area
  • Professional Installation - Secure setup on any level surface
  • Easy Integration - Works seamlessly with DJ setup
  • Weather Protection - Can be used indoors or outdoors (with tent coverage)

Service Area

Primary Service Area: Georgia

Additional travel available—inquire for your location.

Setup & Logistics

Delivery & Setup

  • We handle all setup and installation
  • Professional team ensures safe, secure installation
  • Typically 1-2 hours for setup depending on size

Breakdown & Removal

  • Full breakdown and removal after your event
  • We leave your venue clean and ready

Timing

  • Available for single events or multi-day rentals
  • Flexible scheduling to fit your timeline

Pricing

Pricing varies by floor size and location. Contact us for a custom quote.

What Affects Pricing

  • Floor size (8x8, 12x12, or 16x16)
  • Event date and duration
  • Delivery distance
  • Setup requirements

Combine Your Services

For the ultimate celebration, combine our dance floor with:

  • Dance Instruction - Learn your first dance on the same floor you’ll use at your event
  • DJ Services - Music, lighting, and energy perfectly coordinated
  • Complete Package Discount - Book all three services and save!

Ready to create the perfect dance floor experience? Contact us to reserve your floor and get a quote.
